title: ‘Wartime Relic’ Explodes Under Campfire in Austria, Injuring Five Children
summary_full: The children, aged 10 to 14, were taken to a hospital for treatment after the explosion in Upper Austria, the police said.
summary_public: The children, aged 10 to 14, were taken to a hospital for treatment after the explosion in Upper Austria, the police said.
